case_title: CHEN, MEI-AI LIAO VS LIN, JING XIN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,838.00 FILED BY CHEN, MEI-AI LIAO AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, JING XIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CERT MAIL SENT TO JING XIN LIN RETURNED SIGNED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-22-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-24-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT; IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
PLTFF'S REQUEST FOR AN ORDER TO "ADVANCE" HEARING DATE TO 5/27 AT 10AM;PAID $10 CASH;TO FOLDER FOR COMM'S DECISION.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, MEI-AI LIAO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIN, JING XIN $3,838.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,870.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-24-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-27-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
